flutter.appDescription: MacroTracker by EPSAIT is a professional calorie and nutrient tracker with local-first privacy.
flutter.createCustomDialogContent: Do you want create a custom meal item?
flutter.addMealQuickActionsSubtitle: Start with barcode, photo, text, or saved meals. If you search, use Food or Recent history.
flutter.addMealTabPackagedHelper: Use this for any food search, including branded items.
flutter.addMealTabGenericHelper: Use this for simple foods like rice, chicken, fruit, or oats.
flutter.addMealRecentEmpty:
No recent meals yet.
Log a meal once and it will appear here.
flutter.mealEntrySubtitle: Choose how to log it. The meal will be saved to {mealType}.
flutter.addMealSearchPromptPackaged: Search any food or use barcode.
flutter.addMealSearchPromptGeneric: Search a generic food like rice, eggs, or yogurt.
flutter.addMealSearchPromptRecent: Search your recent history or open saved meals.
flutter.onboardingIntroDescription:
To start, the app needs some information about you to calculate your daily calorie goal.
All information about you is stored securely on your device.
flutter.onboardingCloudProtectBody: MacroTracker is ready without sign-up. If you protect your account with Google, you can recover it on a new phone and use professional nutritionist connections. This does not enable Google Drive.
flutter.onboardingOverviewDataFootnote: You can adjust these targets later from Profile. Your data starts on this device; after this you can optionally protect a cloud account for recovery.
flutter.disclaimerText: MacroTracker is not a medical application. All data provided is not validated and should be used with caution. Please maintain a healthy lifestyle and consult a professional if you have any problems. Use during illness, pregnancy or lactation is not recommended.
flutter.reportErrorDialogText: Do you want to report an error to the developer?
flutter.sendAnonymousUserData: Send anonymous crash and diagnostic reports
flutter.calculationsGramPerKgHint: Protein and fat will be calculated by multiplying each value by {weight}. Carbs will fill the remaining kcal from the automatic target.
flutter.exportImportDescription: Export ZIP creates a local manual copy that you can import later. MacroTracker is local-first; Cuenta cloud, Google Drive backup, AI, and coach connections are optional and separate.
flutter.driveBackupSubtitle: Creates an encrypted ZIP of your data and stores it in your own Drive. This is separate from your MacroTracker cloud account.
flutter.driveBackupConnectedSnack: Google Drive connected. This does not change your cloud account.
flutter.driveBackupOAuthMissing: Google Drive OAuth is still missing for this platform. See docs/google-drive-backup-setup.md.
flutter.driveBackupNoUploadYet: No backup has been uploaded yet.
flutter.driveBackupDailySignedInBody: Android will schedule one backup per day when the system allows background work to run.
flutter.driveBackupDailyConnectFirstBody: Connect Google Drive first to enable daily backups.
flutter.driveBackupDailyScheduleNote: The first run is scheduled for the next overnight window. Android may shift it by minutes or hours depending on battery, network, and power-saving rules.
flutter.deleteTimeDialogContent: Do want to delete the selected item?
flutter.deleteTimeDialogPluralContent: Do want to delete all items of this meal?
flutter.copyDialogTitle: Which meal type do you want to copy to?
flutter.copyOrDeleteTimeDialogTitle: What do you want to do?
flutter.copyOrDeleteTimeDialogContent: With "Copy to today" you can copy the meal to today. With "Delete" you can delete the meal.
flutter.offDisclaimer: The data provided to you by this app are retrieved from the Open Food Facts database. No guarantees can be made for the accuracy, completeness, or reliability of the information provided. The data are provided “as is” and the originating source for the data (Open Food Facts) is not liable for any damages arising out of the use of the data.

Information provided
 by the 
'2011 Compendium
 of Physical Activities'
flutter.missingProductInfo: Product missing required kcal or macronutrients information
flutter.errorMealSave: Error while saving meal. Did you input the correct meal information?
flutter.bmiInfo:
Body Mass Index (BMI) is a index to classify overweight and obesity in adults. It is defined as weight in kilograms divided by the square of height in meters (kg/m²).

BMI does not differentiate between fat and muscle mass and can be misleading for some individuals.
flutter.readLabel: I have read and accept the privacy policy.
flutter.dataCollectionLabel: Help improve stability by sending anonymous crash and diagnostic reports
flutter.palSedentaryDescriptionLabel: e.g. office job and mostly sitting free time activities
flutter.palLowActiveDescriptionLabel: e.g. sitting or standing in job and light free time activities
flutter.palActiveDescriptionLabel: Mostly standing or walking in job and active free time activities
flutter.palVeryActiveDescriptionLabel: Mostly walking, running or carrying weight in job and active free time activities
flutter.nutritionalStatusRiskLow:
Low 
(but risk of other 
clinical problems increased)
flutter.paCalisthenicsGeneralDesc: light or moderate effort, general (e.g., back exercises)
flutter.paResistanceTrainingDesc: weight lifting, free weight, nautilus or universal
flutter.paDancingGeneralDesc: e.g. disco, folk, Irish step dancing, line dancing, polka, country
flutter.paChildrenGameDesc: (e.g., hopscotch, 4-square, dodgeball, playground apparatus, t-ball, tetherball, marbles, arcade games), moderate effort
flutter.paMartialArtsSlowerDesc: different types, slower pace, novice performers, practice
flutter.paMartialArtsModerateDesc: different types, moderate pace (e.g., judo, jujitsu, karate, kick boxing, tae kwan do, tai-bo, Muay Thai boxing)
flutter.paMotoCrossDesc: off-road motor sports, all-terrain vehicle, general
flutter.paRopeJumpingGeneralDesc: moderate pace, 100-120 skips/min, general, 2 foot skip, plain bounce
flutter.paTrackField2Desc: (e.g. high jump, long jump, triple jump, javelin, pole vault)
flutter.paSailingGeneralDesc: boat and board sailing, windsurfing, ice sailing, general
flutter.aiDraftPremiumMessage: {count} ingredients detected, about {kcal} kcal. You can save without using trials.
flutter.aiDraftTrialMessage: {count} ingredients detected, about {kcal} kcal. Reviewing is free; saving uses 1 of your {remaining} trials.
flutter.aiDraftBlockedMessage: {count} ingredients detected, about {kcal} kcal. Upgrade to save unlimited AI meals.
flutter.aiRecipeNameHelper: Use names like pre-workout oats, post-workout chicken rice, or shake.
flutter.aiCaptureByPhotoSubtitle: Import a meal image, review the editable draft, and save it to {mealType}.
flutter.aiHintCheckSaucesSubtitle: The draft is just the first step. Correct hidden calories.
flutter.aiHintGymMealsSubtitle: Useful for bowls, shakes, post-workouts, and repeated meals.
flutter.aiPhotoReviewNotice: AI suggests ingredients and macros. You review everything before saving.
flutter.aiPhotoHintSubtitle: Open this if you want better detection.
flutter.aiPhotoCorrectionHint: You will be able to correct ingredients before saving.
flutter.aiPhotoPreviewSubtitle: Confirm the photo looks good before sending it to AI.
flutter.aiCaptureDraftReviewNotice: AI is preparing a draft. You will be able to review, edit, or remove ingredients before saving.
flutter.aiFailureTimeoutManualReview: The AI request timed out. Retry or continue with a manual review.
flutter.aiFailureNoNetworkManualReview: No network connection. Retry when you are back online or continue with a manual review.
flutter.aiFailureCloudSessionInvalid: Your cloud session is no longer valid. Reopen or protect your cloud account and retry.
flutter.aiFailureInvalidResponseManualDraft: The AI response could not be used. Retry or continue with a manual draft.
flutter.aiFailureUnavailableManual: AI meal interpretation is temporarily unavailable. Retry or continue manually.
flutter.aiTextDescribeMealSubtitle: Write ingredients, quantities, or a full meal so AI can prepare a draft for you.
flutter.aiTextReviewNotice: AI creates an editable draft. You review ingredients and macros before saving.
flutter.aiTextInputHint: Example: 200 g chicken, 150 g rice, salad with olive oil, and a Greek yogurt
flutter.aiTextSpecificityHint: The more specific you are, the better the draft will be.
flutter.aiTextExampleSimpleBreakfastValue: Coffee with milk, toast with tomato, and two eggs
flutter.aiTextExampleAmountsValue: 180 g salmon, 220 g roasted potato, and salad with 10 ml olive oil
flutter.aiTextExampleQuickDinnerValue: Chicken burrito with cheese, guacamole, and a Coke Zero
flutter.aiTextBestPracticesSubtitle: Open this if you want better results.
flutter.aiTextHintAmountsTitle: Include amounts if you know them
flutter.aiTextHintAmountsSubtitle: Grams, units, or tablespoons help estimate more accurately.
flutter.aiTextHintDishTitle: Write the dish and the sides
flutter.aiTextHintDishSubtitle: Do not write only "pasta"; better "pasta with tuna and tomato".
flutter.aiTextHintSaucesTitle: Do not forget drinks and sauces
flutter.aiTextHintSaucesSubtitle: They often change the final calories quite a bit.
flutter.aiErrorPayloadTooLarge: Image is too large for remote AI. Local draft created.
flutter.aiErrorMissingKey: Remote AI is not configured in backend. Local draft created.
flutter.aiErrorQuotaExceeded: Remote AI quota/rate limit reached. Local draft created.
flutter.aiErrorUnsupportedFormat: Image format not supported by remote AI. Try JPG/PNG. Local draft created.
flutter.aiErrorGeneric: Remote image interpretation failed. Local draft created with memory support.
flutter.aiPhotoCapturedHint: Tap to enlarge. Toggle crop/fit for quick inspection.
flutter.aiCustomServingsHelper: Adjust the final portion before saving.
flutter.aiMatchesHint: Use a frequent meal, recipe, or previous correction if it looks more like what you ate.
flutter.aiMatchesReferenceHint: This is only a reference. It will never be added to your meal automatically.
flutter.aiTrialGuestAllowanceUsed: You have used the guest allowance. Protect your account to unlock {count} more free uses.
flutter.aiTrialLimitUsed: You have used your {count} AI trials.
flutter.aiConfidenceLowHint: This ingredient has low certainty. Your habitual correction is usually the fastest option.
flutter.aiConfidenceLowGenericHint: This ingredient has low certainty. Check amount or replace it with a more precise food.
flutter.aiConfidenceMediumHint: The amount may vary. Check the portion if you see it doesn't fit the photo.
flutter.macroSuggestionsEmpty: Save some recipes and this section will start suggesting based on your training day.
flutter.macroSuggestionsSubtitleGym: Recommended meals to perform and recover better.
flutter.macroSuggestionsSubtitleLoseWeight: High protein options with controlled calories.
flutter.macroSuggestionsSubtitleRest: Clean closings with high protein and no caloric excess.
flutter.macroSuggestionsSubtitleDefault: Saved meals based on what you are still missing today.
flutter.macroSuggestionsRationaleCutClose: Lean close for cut days: protein-first with calories kept tight.
flutter.macroSuggestionsRationalePostWorkout: Post-workout recovery hit with enough carbs and protein to reload.
flutter.macroSuggestionsRationalePreWorkout: Good pre-workout fuel: useful carbs without much digestive drag.
flutter.macroSuggestionsRationaleProteinClose: Protein-first close to finish the day without guessing.
flutter.macroSuggestionsRationaleShakeLight: Fast protein touch when you want something light and easy to log.
flutter.macroSuggestionsRationaleCalorieFit: Clean fit for the calories you still have left.
flutter.macroSuggestionsRationaleDefault: Solid gym-friendly option that keeps the day moving in the right direction.
flutter.macroCoachSubtitleTraining: Premium adjusts real meals to your workout and remaining macros.
flutter.macroCoachSubtitleCut: Close the day with high protein and controlled calories.
flutter.macroCoachSubtitleRest: Light options to keep adherence without overshooting.
flutter.macroCoachSubtitleDefault: Choose what to eat now based on what is left today.
flutter.macroCoachLockedSubtitle: Personalized suggestions tailored to your remaining macros.
flutter.homeDashboardEmpty: Log a meal or workout to unlock better guidance.
flutter.homeTodayActionsSubtitle: Suggestions and ready meals to close macros without friction.
flutter.homeTrackingSubtitle: Adherence, progress, and trends for better adjustments.
flutter.homeNutritionistPromoSubtitle: Sync macros, get tailored meal guides, and chat directly with your professional.
flutter.homeDashboardEmptySubtitle: Take a photo of your meal and AI does the rest.
flutter.homeDashboardStatusDefClosing: Definition on track. Keep the last meal high in protein.
flutter.homeDashboardStatusBulkOpen: You still have room. Add easy carbs and protein.
flutter.homeDashboardStatusProteinGap: Protein is still the main gap. Prioritize it next meal.
flutter.homeDashboardStatusCarbWindow: You still have carb room. Good moment for training fuel.
flutter.homeDashboardStatusRestClosing: Rest day almost closed. Finish light and protein-first.
flutter.homeDashboardStatusOverGoal: You are above target. Keep the rest of the day tighter.
flutter.homeDashboardStatusDefault: Good pace. Keep it simple and close the day clean.
flutter.aiTextCaptureHint: Example: 2 eggs, toast with butter and coffee with milk
flutter.aiTextCaptureDescription: Describe the meal naturally. The text can be processed remotely to estimate ingredients and macros, and you will always review the draft before saving.
flutter.aiTextCaptureError: Remote interpretation not available. Local draft created with memory support.
flutter.aiReplaceEmpty: Search for a food to replace this ingredient.
flutter.aiReplaceError: Cannot search for food right now.
flutter.weeklyInsightsLockedAdjustmentBody: Your weight trends and intake indicate you should adjust your daily calories. Premium calculates the exact change and applies it automatically.
flutter.weeklyShareImageError: Could not generate the progress card image.
flutter.weeklyInsightsNoFrequentMeals: No repeated meals detected this week.
flutter.professionalSectionConnectSubtitle: Activate this section with an invite and consent. Here you will see plan, follow-up, privacy, and messages.
flutter.professionalSectionConnectedSubtitle: This is where you control your plan, real follow-up, shared privacy, and professional notes.
flutter.professionalSectionLoadErrorTitle: Could not load the full section
flutter.professionalSummaryOperationsSubtitle: Active plan, today target, and sync status.
flutter.professionalSummaryDailyContextSubtitle: Share details of your day (energy, digestion, events) with your nutritionist.
flutter.professionalSummaryCalorieProgressBody: Daily progress compared to targets assigned by your nutritionist.
flutter.professionalInviteNotFound: No pending invite was found for that code.
flutter.professionalProtectAccountBody: To connect with a nutritionist, protect your cloud account with Google first. This keeps your account recoverable and preserves consent if you change phones. This does not enable Google Drive.
flutter.professionalProtectAccountReturnHint: Complete Google and return to accept the invite.
flutter.professionalDisconnectBody: Access will be revoked, this section will disappear, and aggregate sync will stop.
flutter.professionalSharingPendingSnapshots: Your coach sees the real active sharing level. If there are {count} pending snapshots, they will sync when connectivity returns.
flutter.professionalSharingModeOfflineError: Could not change the privacy level because the device is offline. Try again when the phone has network access.
flutter.professionalSharingModePermissionError: Could not update the permission with this professional. The relationship may have been revoked or the backend is still blocking this change.
flutter.professionalSharingModeNotPersistedError: The change was not persisted on the server. Close and reopen this section before trying again.
flutter.professionalSharingModeSessionError: Your cloud session is no longer valid for changing this permission. Sign in again and try once more.
flutter.professionalSharingModeGenericError: Could not change the privacy level for this relationship. Try again in a few seconds.
flutter.professionalPlanDefaultObjective: Your professional prepared this structure to guide your week.
flutter.professionalPlanWeeklyViewSubtitle: Tap a day to view its detailed calorie breakdown and log its meals.
flutter.professionalPlanMealGuideSubtitle: Tap a meal to view its macronutrient breakdown, or use "+" to add it to today's diary.
flutter.professionalPlanEquivalentSubstitutesSub: Portions scaled to match the exact target macronutrients of this meal.
flutter.professionalRecipesEmptyBody: Your nutritionist will send you recipes here.
flutter.professionalPlanLogSuggestedMealBody: Do you want to add "{title}" ({kcal} kcal) to today's diary under "{slotName}"?
flutter.professionalTrackingDailySubtitle: Quick adherence read so you know how the day is going against the plan.
flutter.professionalTrackingWeeklySubtitle: This shows whether the week keeps its direction, not only whether a single day was perfect.
flutter.professionalTrackingTapBarHint: Tap a column to view detail
flutter.professionalTrackingWeeklyChartSubtitle: Daily visual comparison of calories consumed vs nutritionist targets.
flutter.professionalPrivacyCurrentLevelSubtitle: This section describes the real level of data being shared right now, without promising more than what is active.
flutter.professionalPrivacySharingModeTitle: Choose between aggregate-only or detailed diary sharing
flutter.professionalPrivacySharingModeSubtitle: Aggregate keeps targets, adherence, snapshots, and messaging. Detailed also unlocks your raw diary for this professional until you change it again.
flutter.professionalPrivacyAggregateModeBody: Right now the professional cannot read your raw diary or per-meal detail.
flutter.professionalPrivacyDetailedModeBody: Right now the professional can read your raw diary and per-meal detail for this relationship.
flutter.professionalPrivacyAccessControlBody: If you revoke access, this section disappears and the professional stops receiving new snapshots.
flutter.professionalMessagesUnavailableBody: The client shell is ready, but async messaging backend support is not available in this version yet.
flutter.professionalMessagesUnavailableHint: For now, you will receive plan changes and follow-up from the rest of this section.
flutter.professionalMessagesThreadSubtitle: Unread professional messages are marked read when tapped.
flutter.professionalMessagesEmpty: There are no messages in this conversation yet.
flutter.professionalMessagesDisabled: Messaging exists, but it is disabled for this connection.
flutter.professionalMessagesInputHint: Example: today I fell short on protein and want to adjust dinner
flutter.professionalHubNoPublishedPlan: Connected with no published plan yet
flutter.professionalInviteSectionBody: You need an invite and consent. You will get professional follow-up, plan, privacy, and access control without mixing it with Google Drive.
flutter.professionalInviteReviewBeforeSharing: Enter the invite to review it before sharing anything.
flutter.professionalConsentReviewSubtitle: Before connecting, you can review exactly what is shared today and what stays outside.
flutter.professionalConsentSharedTodayBody: kcal, macros, logged meals, aggregate adherence by day, and bidirectional messaging
flutter.professionalConsentNotSharedTodayBody: full raw diary and per-meal detail unless you enable detailed sharing later
flutter.professionalConsentRevokeHint: You can revoke access at any time from the privacy section.
flutter.professionalEmptyPlanBody: Your coach is already connected to you, but has not published an active plan yet. When they do, this section will show daily targets, follow-up, and suggested meals.
flutter.professionalErrorOffline: Could not connect. Check your connection and try again.
flutter.professionalErrorCloudIdentity: Could not create the cloud identity required to connect the plan.
flutter.professionalErrorAction: The action could not be completed. Try again.
flutter.professionalPrivacyAggregateTargets: goal vs actual kcal and macros in aggregate form
flutter.professionalPrivacyAggregateTrackedDaysM: tracked days and number of logged meals
flutter.professionalPrivacyPerMealDetailWhenRead: per-meal detail when backend, legal copy, and consent are ready
flutter.recipeLibraryEmpty:
No saved meals yet.
Save meals as recipes to reuse them.
flutter.recipeLibraryIntro: One library, two sources: meals you save manually and repeated meals detected automatically.
flutter.recipeLibraryIntroCard: Filter by real category, pin key recipes, and edit them directly from the library.
flutter.recipeLibraryManualSectionSubtitle: You save these on purpose to reuse them whenever you want.
flutter.recipeLibraryFrequentSectionSubtitle: Detected from your history so you can repeat them faster.
flutter.recipeDetailNoDetailedIngredients: No detailed ingredients for this recipe.
flutter.recipeEditorServingsHelper: Default serving amount when logging this recipe.
flutter.recipeEditorIngredientsEmpty: Add foods to adjust this recipe.

flutter.recipeEditorSearchUnavailable: Search is unavailable right now. Check the connection and try again.
flutter.recipeScraperSubtitle: Paste a link to a cooking blog or recipe and the AI will extract it automatically.
flutter.recipeScraperUrlSchemeError: URL must start with http:// or https://
flutter.settingsAiCostDescription: Based on real token usage per backend request.
flutter.settingsAccountDeletedMessage: Cloud account and device data deleted.
flutter.settingsReportBugSubtitle: Let us know about an issue in the app.
flutter.settingsReportBugEmailBody:
Please describe the bug here:



---
System info:
Platform: {platform}
flutter.settingsSuggestFeatureSubtitle: What would you like to see in MacroTracker?
flutter.settingsFeatureRequestEmailBody: Describe the feature you would like to see:
flutter.settingsNutritionistConnectionBody: Connect your account with a professional by invite and consent.
flutter.settingsAnonymousDataSubtitle: You can turn this on or off at any time.
flutter.settingsDeleteCloudAccountSubtitle: Permanently deletes your profile, local logs, and linked cloud data.
flutter.settingsAboutProjectValue: Calorie, macro, habit, activity, and local/Drive backup tracking.
flutter.settingsAboutModelValue: Local-first app with optional sync and AI-assisted meal interpretation.
flutter.settingsPremiumUnlockedMessage: Text and photo AI logging is unlocked.
flutter.settingsGuestAllowanceUsedBody: You have used the guest allowance. Protect your account to unlock {count} more free uses.
flutter.settingsTrialProtectBody: {remaining} of {limit} free uses available now. Protect your account to keep them and unlock {count} more.
flutter.settingsSubscriptionActive: Your subscription is active on this device.
flutter.settingsInviteFriendsBody: Share your invitation code with a friend and you both get extra free AI uses when they redeem it.
flutter.settingsReferralCopiedMessage: Invitation link and code copied to clipboard.
flutter.settingsReferralShareMessage: Try MacroTracker! Log meals with AI in seconds. Use my referral code: {code} and we both get extra free AI uses. {url}
flutter.settingsReferralAlreadyRedeemedMessage: You have already redeemed an invitation code.
flutter.settingsInvitedByFriendQuestion: Were you invited by a friend?
flutter.settingsReferralRedeemSuccess: Code redeemed successfully. You earned free AI uses.
flutter.settingsReferralSelfReferral: You cannot redeem your own code.
flutter.settingsReferralRedeemError: Error redeeming code. Please try again.
flutter.settingsDeleteConfirmBody: This action is irreversible. MacroTracker will first delete your current cloud account and its linked remote data. Only after that succeeds will it erase the local data on this device.
flutter.settingsDeleteConfirmFailureGuard: If cloud deletion fails, MacroTracker will not show the account as deleted and your local device data will be kept.
flutter.settingsDeleteConfirmTypePrompt: To confirm, type "{target}" in the box below:
flutter.settingsDeleteErrorSessionInvalid: Your cloud session is no longer valid. Sign in again and repeat the deletion.
flutter.settingsDeleteErrorCloudUnreachable: Could not reach the cloud service. Check the connection and try again.
flutter.settingsDeleteErrorLocalKept: Could not delete the cloud account right now. Local data has been kept on this device.
flutter.settingsDeleteErrorGeneric: Could not delete the cloud account right now.
flutter.settingsCloudIdentityFallback: Identity for recovery and nutritionist connections
flutter.settingsProtectAccountBackupsBody: Protect your account and configure backups.
flutter.settingsGoogleAccountBody: Link Google to recover your account.
flutter.settingsGoogleDriveBackupBody: Store an encrypted copy in your own Drive.
flutter.settingsExportZipBody: Manual local copy to store or move data.
flutter.mealCaptureFallbackSimilarMealSummary: Remote interpretation was unavailable. MacroTracker suggested a similar meal from your history to speed up review.
flutter.mealCaptureFallbackReviewDraftSummary: Remote interpretation was unavailable. Review the draft and use your saved suggestions to adjust it quickly.
flutter.mealReminderChannelDescription: Daily reminders to log your meals.
flutter.mealReminderBreakfastBody: Do not forget to log your breakfast.
flutter.mealReminderLunchBody: Log your lunch when you are done.
flutter.mealReminderSnackBody: You can still log your snack.
flutter.mealReminderDinnerBody: Close the day by logging dinner.
flutter.mealReminderSubtitle: Android will remind you to log breakfast, lunch, snack, and dinner.
flutter.mealReminderPermissionDeniedMessage: Could not enable reminders because Android permission was denied.
flutter.healthStatusUnavailableName: {integration} is not available on this device.
flutter.healthStatusPermissionsReview: {integration} connected. If sync fails, review permissions.

flutter.healthStatusReviewPermissions: {integration} connected. If sync fails, review permissions.
flutter.healthStatusStepsPermissionMissing: Steps permission missing. Sync will be partial.
flutter.healthStatusWorkoutPermissionMissing: Workout detail permissions missing. Some calories may stay at 0.
flutter.healthStatusReadyName: {integration} connected. Sleep, steps, and workouts can sync automatically.
flutter.healthSyncAlreadyCurrent: Your {integration} data is already up to date.

flutter.paywallGoogleComplete: Complete Google and return to MacroTracker.
flutter.paywallUnlockFreeUsesTitle: Unlock your remaining free uses with Google

flutter.paywallPremiumUnavailable: Premium plans are not available right now.
flutter.paywallPremiumNotConfigured: Premium is not configured for this build. Please contact support.

flutter.paywallBenefitLearnsCorrections: AI learns from your usual corrections

flutter.paywallBenefitAdjustedServings: Servings adjusted to your remaining calories and protein

flutter.healthConnectGrantPermissionsSubtitle: Open the permission flow for sleep, steps, and workouts.
flutter.healthConnectStatusUnavailable: Health Connect is not available on this device.
flutter.healthConnectStatusPermissionsRequired: Health permissions are required to read sleep, steps, and workouts.
flutter.healthConnectStatusActivityPermissionReq: Activity Recognition permission is required for steps.
flutter.healthConnectStatusReady: Connected. Sleep, steps, and workouts can sync automatically.
flutter.healthConnectPermissionsMissing: Health Connect permissions are still missing.
flutter.healthConnectSyncSuccess: Health Connect data synced, including workouts.
flutter.healthConnectSyncNoChanges: No new Health Connect data or workouts were imported.
flutter.gymHabitsManualAdjustHint: Use +/- only if you need to correct the value.
flutter.gymHabitsHydrationHintLowerBody: Higher hydration target for leg day: {goal}.
flutter.homeWeeklyInsightsSubtitle: Check averages, adherence, protein and top meals
flutter.quickMealsSubtitle: Use your saved recipes first. One tap logs a serving fast.
flutter.quickMealsEmptyAll: Save meals as recipes to keep them one tap away here.
flutter.quickMealsEmptyFiltered: No quick meals in this lane yet. Use clear workout-style names so they are easier to recognize later.
flutter.diaryEmptyDaySubtitle: There are no meals or activities on this day yet.
flutter.diaryMacrosSummary: Carbs {carbsTracked}/{carbsGoal} g, fat {fatTracked}/{fatGoal} g, protein {proteinTracked}/{proteinGoal} g
flutter.diaryQuickAmountSubtitle: Adjust the logged amount in steps of {step} {unit}.
flutter.profileYourProfileSubtitle: Adjust your base data so that calories, macros and recommendations are consistent.
flutter.profileCalculationBase: Calculation base for goals, tracking and suggestions.
flutter.profileGoalAndStrategySubtitle: What you change here impacts calories, macros and daily adjustments.
flutter.profileBodyDataSubtitle: Weight, height, age and sex so that the base calculation remains accurate.
flutter.profileDailyStepsGoalBody: Set your daily steps goal. If left empty, the default value based on the day will be used.
flutter.profileSleepHoursGoalBody: Set your daily sleep hours goal. If left empty, the default value based on the day will be used.
flutter.profileDailyWaterGoalBody: Set your daily water goal ({unit}). If left empty, the default value based on the day will be used.
flutter.profileTargetsRecalculatedSnack: Targets recalculated. You can review the strategy.
flutter.profileGoalLoseDesc: Short and controlled deficit to lose fat without compromising performance or muscle mass.
flutter.profileGoalMaintainDesc: Maintain stable weight while prioritizing strength, performance and adherence.
flutter.profileGoalGainDesc: Measured surplus to push training, recovery and progression.
flutter.profileFocusLowerBody: Today the distribution increases carbs to support a hard leg session.
flutter.profileFocusUpperBody: Today the distribution maintains good fuel and clean recovery for torso.
flutter.profileFocusCardio: Today the distribution seeks enough energy without adding extra carbs.
flutter.profileFocusRest: Today the distribution cuts carbs and maintains high protein to recover.
flutter.nudgeKeepAdherence: Only useful alerts to maintain adherence.
flutter.nudgeProteinLeft: You have {amount}g of protein left. Prioritize a high protein meal.
flutter.nudgeLowHydration: Low hydration today. Drink water to close at 100%.
flutter.nudgeDayClosing: Closing the day: you lack energy for goal. Add a clean closing meal.
flutter.nudgeNoReminders: No pending reminders. Doing great today.
flutter.weeklyInsightsSummaryNoDays: No days registered this week yet.
flutter.weeklyInsightsSummarySolid: Solid week: good caloric adherence and protein consistency.
flutter.weeklyInsightsSummaryIrregular: Caloric adherence was irregular this week.
flutter.weeklyInsightsSummaryProteinGap: The main gap was protein consistency.
flutter.weeklyInsightsSummaryStable: Stable week, with room to improve consistency.
flutter.weeklyInsightsRecAdherenceLow: Adherence too low for automatic adjustment. Improve consistency first.
flutter.weeklyInsightsRecLoseWeightFast: Weight dropping too fast: suggestion +50 kcal/day.
flutter.weeklyInsightsRecLoseWeightCorrect: Correct definition pace. No kcal change.
flutter.weeklyInsightsRecGainFast: Weight rising too fast: suggestion -50 kcal/day.
flutter.weeklyInsightsRecGainCorrect: Controlled bulk pace. No kcal change.
flutter.bodyProgressLoadError: Body progress could not be loaded.
flutter.bodyProgressNotEnoughData: Not enough data for this metric yet.
flutter.bodyProgressNoCheckins: No body check-ins yet. Start logging weight and waist to get a usable trend.
flutter.bodyProgressTrendWeightNeedData: Weight trend needs another full week of check-ins.
flutter.bodyProgressTrendWeightSteady: Weight is holding steady week over week.
flutter.bodyProgressTrendWeightDown: Weight is trending down versus the previous 7-day average.
flutter.bodyProgressTrendWeightUp: Weight is trending up versus the previous 7-day average.
flutter.bodyProgressTrendWaistNeedData: Waist trend needs at least two waist check-ins.
flutter.bodyProgressTrendWaistSteady: Waist is stable across the latest check-ins.
flutter.bodyProgressTrendWaistDown: Waist is tightening versus the previous waist check-in.
flutter.bodyProgressTrendWaistUp: Waist is up versus the previous waist check-in.
flutter.bodyProgressAddCheckinsUnlockChart: Add a few body check-ins to unlock the trend chart.
flutter.professionalNotesEmptyBody: Your nutritionist has not written any notes.
flutter.professionalPlanStatusExact: You are exactly on today's target.
flutter.checkinTabReviewShortly: Your nutritionist will review it shortly.
flutter.checkinTabNotesHint: Any challenges or wins this week?
flutter.featureTourDesc0: We will show you how the application works to help you track your nutrition, workouts, and daily habits in just 1 minute.
flutter.featureTourDesc1:
Tap the (+) button to log food quickly:
• Scan barcodes.
• Use our private text or photo AI (fully anonymous).
• Enter calories and macros manually.

Tap it right now to see it open!
flutter.featureTourDesc2:
Your central panel calculates remaining calories in real time:
• Adds base goals and subtracts food intake.
• Monitors proteins, carbs, and fats to balance your day.
flutter.featureTourDesc3: Track your steps, sleep, and water. MacroTracker syncs automatically with Health Connect to import your data effortlessly.
flutter.featureTourDesc4: Track your evolution by logging body weight and measurements. View interactive trend charts to stay motivated.
flutter.featureTourDesc5: Receive smart weekly reports generated from your progress. The app will advise you how to adjust your plan to avoid plateaus.
flutter.featureTourDesc6: If your nutritionist uses the platform, you can link your account using their invite code to let them supervise and adapt your plan in real time.
flutter.featureTourDesc7:
Organize your intakes by time of day (breakfast, lunch, snack, dinner) and perform continuous tracking of your habits.

Tap the 'Diary' tab on the bottom bar to continue.
flutter.featureTourDesc8: Review your daily intake. Tap any food to edit its grams or swipe to delete it if you made a mistake.
flutter.featureTourDesc9: Save your frequent meals in your library. Also, copy the link of any web recipe and our AI will import its ingredients automatically.
flutter.featureTourDesc10:
Access here to adjust your caloric requirements, change the language, metric/imperial units, or the application theme.

Tap the 'Profile' tab to continue.
flutter.featureTourDesc11: Link your account to sync your data in the cloud and schedule automatic encrypted backups to your Google Drive account.
flutter.featureTourDesc12: You have completed the interactive tour. Start logging your meals and habits today to reach your physical goal. Good luck!

appshell.a_restrained_operational_surface_for_nut: A restrained operational surface for nutritionists.
appshell.manage_real_relationships_plans_check_in: Manage real relationships, plans, check-ins, and shared snapshots without marketing noise, invented metrics, or privacy/billing confusion.

authpanel.first_create_the_account_in_supabase_aut: First create the account in Supabase Auth. After that you can save the professional profile without hitting the `professionals.user_id` foreign key.
authpanel.access_your_real_roster_plans_follow_up_: Access your real roster, plans, follow-up, and practice operations.

billingpanel.create_the_professional_profile_before_o: Create the professional profile before opening Stripe checkout.
billingpanel.the_portal_separates_access_status_comme: The portal separates access status, commercial tier, and billing interval. A plan unlocks operational capacity; it does not change the privacy contract with clients.
billingpanel.checkout_completed_if_the_stripe_webhook: Checkout completed. If the Stripe webhook has not landed yet, refresh the profile in a few seconds.
billingpanel.checkout_canceled_no_billing_change_was_: Checkout canceled. No billing change was applied.
billingpanel.you_are_on_the_free_trial_plan: You are on the free trial plan
billingpanel.your_trial_account_allows_you_to_connect: Your trial account allows you to connect with exactly 1 client for free. To expand your limit and invite more clients, select one of the professional plans below.
billingpanel.invites_and_plan_publishing_are_enabled: Invites and plan publishing are enabled.
billingpanel.invites_and_new_plans_stay_blocked_until: Invites and new plans stay blocked until billing is active.
billingpanel.annual_checkout_depends_on_the_matching_: Annual checkout depends on the matching `*_ANNUAL_PRICE_ID` secrets being configured in Supabase. If they are missing, the error is explicit.
billingpanel.existing_records_may_remain_readable_but: Existing records may remain readable, but new invites and new plans should stay blocked while access status is "{billingsummary_prostatus}".
billingpanel.snapshots_macro_adherence_and_summary_pr: Snapshots, macro adherence, and summary progress can be visible with an active relationship.
billingpanel.raw_diary_rows_only_appear_when_the_clie: Raw diary rows only appear when the client keeps the relationship active and the mode is detailed.
billingpanel.a_higher_tier_increases_capacity_not_the: A higher tier increases capacity, not the amount of private data the professional may access.
billingpanel.when_billing_lapses_historical_records_c: When billing lapses, historical records can remain readable while new invites and new plans are blocked.
billingpanel.for_solo_nutritionists_validating_the_wo: For solo nutritionists validating the workflow with a small roster.
billingpanel.plans_notes_check_ins_and_aggregate_snap: Plans, notes, check-ins, and aggregate snapshots
billingpanel.detailed_diary_only_when_the_client_gran: Detailed diary only when the client grants explicit consent
billingpanel.for_practices_already_managing_a_stable_: For practices already managing a stable book of recurring clients.
billingpanel.the_same_operational_surfaces_as_starter: The same operational surfaces as Starter
billingpanel.more_capacity_for_plan_publishing_and_in: More capacity for plan publishing and invite operations
billingpanel.for_larger_teams_using_the_portal_as_a_c: For larger teams using the portal as a controlled internal operation.
billingpanel.the_same_data_contract_and_privacy_model: The same data contract and privacy model
billingpanel.historical_relationships_readable_until_: Historical client relationships remain readable, but plan publishing and new invites are blocked until the payment is resolved.
billingpanel.historical_records_read_only_until_react: Your access is currently read-only. Reactivate your plan to resume client invitations and plan operations.
billingpanel.billing_state_and_capacity_healthy: Your billing state and roster capacity are healthy. All operations are fully enabled.
billingpanel.use_trial_carefully_until_upgrade: You are using the free trial. Upgrades are available below to support more client relationships.
billingpanel.complete_billing_activation_before_new_o: Complete your billing activation below to unlock client connections and plan publishing.
billingpanel.access_and_capacity_tracked_separately: Access status and capacity limits are tracked separately.
billingpanel.allowed_in_current_plan: Maximum {client_limit} clients allowed in your plan.
billingpanel.capacity_is_full_right_now: Roster capacity is full. Upgrade your plan to invite more clients.
billingpanel.room_to_invite_more_clients: You have available slots to connect new clients.
billingpanel.practice_not_operational_status_body: Professional operations stay restricted while the access status is "{status}".
billingpanel.what_unlocks_after_payment_body: Payment immediately upgrades your roster capacity and enables both new client connections and plan publishing.
billingpanel.what_happens_if_i_cancel_body: Your roster falls back to read-only. Existing relationships and plans stay readable, but publishing new plans or adding connections is blocked.
billingpanel.how_does_the_1_client_trial_work_body: It lets you test the full analytical and publishing workflow with exactly one active client connection completely free of charge.
billingpanel.what_if_checkout_succeeds_but_portal_loo: What if checkout succeeds but the portal stays stale?
Stripe webhooks can take a few seconds to land. Simply reload the portal or wait a few seconds for the status to synchronize.
